name: kimi-code-for-copilot
displayName: Kimi Code for Copilot — Usage Tracking
description: Kimi Code (K2.7) in GitHub Copilot Chat. Track CodingPlan usage and quota in real-time status bar. BYOK integration with one-click setup.

commands.title: Kimi Code: Get API Key (Open Console)

kimi-code-copilot.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the Kimi Code API (OpenAI-compatible endpoint).

kimi-code-copilot.maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per request. Set to 0 for model default.

kimi-code-copilot.modelId.description: Model ID to use. Default is 'kimi-for-coding' (auto-updated to latest K2.x Code model).

kimi-code-copilot.debug.description: Enable debug logging to the output channel.

kimi-code-copilot.usageRefreshInterval.description: Interval in seconds for auto-refreshing Kimi Code usage data from API. Minimum 5s.

kimi-code-copilot.displayRefreshInterval.description: Interval in seconds for updating the status bar display (does not call API). Minimum 1s.

kimi-code-copilot.dashboard.allowLan.description: Allow the usage dashboard to be accessed from other devices on the same network. Requires an explicit confirmation on each start.

kimi-code-copilot.dashboard.accessToken.description: Optional access token required to open the usage dashboard (?token=...). Leave empty to disable.

walkthroughs.title: Kimi Code for Copilot
walkthroughs.description: Connect Kimi Code (K2.7) to GitHub Copilot Chat and track your usage.

steps.title: 获取 API Key
steps.description:
访问 [Kimi Code 控制台](https://www.kimi.com/code/console) 创建 API Key。

创建后返回 VS Code，使用命令 **Kimi Code: Set API Key** 粘贴并验证。

steps.title: 在 Copilot Chat 中选择模型
steps.description: 打开 Copilot Chat（Cmd+Shift+I），在模型选择器中选择 **Kimi Code** 或 **Kimi Code (thinking)** 即可开始对话。

media.altText: Select Kimi Code in Copilot Chat

steps.title: 追踪用量
steps.description:
状态栏会实时显示 Token 消耗与剩余额度。

需要手机查看？执行 **Kimi Code: Start Usage Dashboard** 启动本地看板（默认仅 localhost 可访问）。

scripts.clean: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('out', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 10 })"
